heading: Powers and obligations of the Board; liability of members
label: 2303 Powers and obligations of the Board; liability of members
text: Except as otherwise provided by this chapter, the Board shall have all the usual powers and obligations of a trustee with respect to property and funds administered by it, but the members of the Board are not personally liable, except for malfeasance.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 300ff (, ).July 9, 1941, ch. 284, § 655 Stat. 582
Amendments1984— amended section generally, inserting “Except as otherwise provided by this chapter,”.Pub. L. 98–497
